markdown_formatted:
## Meeting Purpose

[Explore potential collaboration on link building and content distribution strategies for GrowthX clients.](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=5.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [GrowthX seeks to enhance their link building capabilities, moving beyond current broker-based approach to a more strategic, in-house solution](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=304.0)
  - [Rob Mitchell shared insights on white hat link building strategies, emphasizing relevance and quality over paid links](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Discussion on evolving link building into broader content distribution and brand awareness strategies, considering AI's impact on SEO](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Potential collaboration options discussed, including part-time consulting and full-time resource allocation](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1951.0)

## Topics

### Current GrowthX Link Building Situation

  - [\~40 clients total, with \~10 requesting link building services](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=538.0)
  - [Currently outsourcing to link buying agencies due to lack of internal resources](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=565.0)
  - [Typical client request: 10-20 backlinks per month, DA 50-90](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=652.0)
  - [Current cost: $750-1000 per link](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1744.0)

### Rob's Link Building Approach

  - [Focuses on white hat strategies, avoiding paid links](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=350.0)
  - [Uses SourceFit (Philippines) for harvesting and QA: 12 people, \~$1200/month each](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1691.0)
  - [Management layer: 3 people at 20-30 hours/week](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1705.0)
  - [Tools: Pitchbox or BuzzStream for outreach](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1080.0)
  - [Conversion rate: 0.5-1% of outreach efforts result in links](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1113.0)
  - [Estimated cost: $150-200 per link](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1890.0)

### Future of Link Building and Content Distribution

  - [Links estimated to account for \~25% of Google's ranking factors](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Shift towards broader branding and content distribution strategies](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1191.0)
  - [Importance of non-linked brand mentions (e.g., Reddit, social media)](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1262.0)
  - [Potential for AI to enhance content creation and outreach efficiency](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1139.0)
  - [Interest in developing thought leadership and data-driven content](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1372.0)

### Potential Collaboration Models

  - [Rob's availability: \~20 hours/month at $50/hour + performance bonuses](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1626.0)
  - [Suggestion to consider Neil Photo for more extensive involvement](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1954.0)
  - [Discussion of building an internal team vs. using contractors](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=2040.0)

## Next Steps

  - [Dave to receive and review Neil Photo's information from Rob](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=2074.0)
  - [Jason and Dave to align on GrowthX's vision for building out link building capabilities](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=2000.0)
  - [Explore potential for full-time resource allocation to develop advanced link building and content distribution strategies](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=2051.0)
  - [Consider integrating AI and GrowthX's content creation capabilities into link building processes](https://fathom.video/share/oyzGp7K2ZfKB1dTi5rUHhraYvTPeLHf4?tab=summary&timestamp=1320.0)
